title: OCX Index Root Config
description: Format-version discovery document served at /config.json. A fixed path convention, not a runtime-discoverable one: a client that understands format_version already knows the full /p/<ns>/<pkg>... path grammar, so there is no packages prefix and no free-text note field (ADR: adr_locked_observation_index_format.md D7).

format_version.description: Monotonically increasing wire-format generation counter. Named format_version, not version, to stay lexically distinct from package-level version concepts.
